name: playwright-pom-structure
description: Simple and maintainable Playwright POM structure with CI/CD-ready setup, Allure reports, and GH Pages publishing

scripts.clean:reports: rm -rf test-results playwright-report allure-results allure-report artifacts reports
scripts.test:with-report-flow: npm run test:ci && npm run report:allure:generate && npm run report:postrun
scripts.clean:reports: rm -rf test-results playwright-report allure-results allure-report artifacts
